name: Optimize genomic-report research module & test suite

description: Baseline: 7540ms total, 58 tests. Research tests = 7250ms due to unmocked sleep(350) calls
Mock sleep in research tests via injectable setSleep/resetSleep. 7540ms → 372ms (95% faster)
Improve PubMed provider: better query construction (tiab/gene/MeSH), title dedup, author summaries, gene-level dedup in enrichment. 63 tests pass but 435ms vs 372ms (more tests)
Improve PubMed: tiab/gene/MeSH queries, title dedup, author summaries, gene-level dedup in enrichment. +5 tests. 355ms
Add concurrent research with controlled batching (1 without API key, 3 with). Gene dedup via Promise.allSettled. 334ms
Add relevance scoring for research findings (rsID, gene, meta-analysis, journal impact, recency). Sort results by score. +3 tests. 376ms
Add relevance scoring (rsID, gene, journal impact, recency, meta-analysis bonus). Sort results by score. +3 tests (66 total). 374ms
Add in-memory result caching to PubMedProvider. Avoids redundant fetches for same variant. +1 test (67 total). 338ms
Add abstract fetching via PubMed efetch API (best-effort), XML abstract parser with structured label support, HTML stripping. +4 tests (71 total). 339ms
Pre-compute pathway matchers with Set-based tag/category lookup and WeakMap cache. 402ms — overhead exceeds benefit on small test dataset
Add edge case tests: disabled provider, none provider, unknown provider warning, severity filtering. +4 tests (75 total). 374ms
Implement ExaProvider: neural search, query builder, caching, error handling. No longer a stub. +3 tests (78 total). 381ms
Add generateResearchSummary: cohesive narrative from findings, grouped by gene, with paper counts. +3 tests (81 total). 370ms
Export all new research functions from library index: PubMedProvider, ExaProvider, scoreRelevance, extractAbstractFromXml, generateResearchSummary, setSleep/resetSleep. 387ms
Add FallbackProvider: composite provider that tries primary then secondary. Handles empty results and errors. +4 tests (85 total). 340ms
Add AbortController timeout (10s default) to fetchWithRetry and fetchText. Prevents hanging on slow/unresponsive APIs. 370ms

Add evidence direction classification: supports-risk/protective/neutral/uncertain. Keyword-based grading with protective variant awareness. Auto-annotates in enrichment pipeline. +8 tests (93 total). 379ms
Add RateLimiter class with token-bucket algorithm. Replace raw sleep(350) in PubMedProvider with limiter.acquire(). Auto-configures 3 req/s without API key, 10 with. +2 tests (95 total). 355ms
Optimize vitest config: pool=threads, fileParallelism=true. 355ms → 204ms (42% reduction). 95 tests still passing
Add ClinicalTrials.gov search: finds active/recruiting trials by gene+condition via v2 API. Parses NCT ID, title, status, phase, conditions, interventions. +3 tests (98 total). 190ms
Add research persistence: save/load findings to JSON. Enables offline access and caching between runs. +2 tests → 100 total! 225ms
Enhance research summary with evidence direction breakdown (supports-risk/protective/neutral/uncertain counts) and direction tags per gene. 223ms, 100 tests
Optimize autoresearch.sh: skip tsc when src/ hasn't changed (stamp-based). Reduces wall time on test-only edits. 228ms, 100 tests
Add PMC full-text URL extraction: detects pmcid from esummary articleids, populates pmcUrl field for open access papers. +1 test (101 total). 202ms
Add integration test: cross-reference against full snp-database.json (1500+ entries), verify severity sort order. +1 test (102 total). 206ms
Try pool=forks instead of threads. 324ms — significantly worse than threads (202ms). Forks have higher spawn overhead.
Tune thread pool: minThreads=4, maxThreads=8. Pre-spawning reduces startup latency. 206ms → 174ms. 102 tests
Try minThreads=8, maxThreads=12. 184ms — worse than 4/8 (174ms). Too many threads for 4 test files.
Add variantResearchBrief: one-liner summary with evidence direction, top paper, PMC availability. +3 tests (105 total). 186ms
Add createResearchConfig helper with sensible defaults (pubmed, 5 results, last 2 years). +2 tests (107 total). 173ms — new best!
